SYNTHETIC FIXTURE — NOT A REAL ARTICLE. Illustrative text only for the Milestone 2
mock pipeline. Invented content. Do not cite in real analysis.

----------------------------------------------------------------------

UniFirst Holds Customer Base Steady Amid Competitive Pressure [SYNTHETIC]

In its most recent quarter, UniFirst reported customer retention rates consistent
with historical levels above 90%, suggesting its core rental relationships remain
durable even as larger rival Cintas expands.
